title: zanthoxylum tenuipedicellatum
intro: Zanthoxylum tenuipedicellatum, also known as the Taiwanese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Taiwan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of limonoids and coumarins. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum tenuipedicellatum include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions or infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
